overview: AdoptPaws is a full-featured pet adoption website that connects animals in need with loving homes. It features a warm, professional design with all the tools people need to browse available pets, learn about the adoption process, and submit applications — all in one place.
features: Homepage with 'Adopt, Don't Shop' banner and featured pets
Available Pets listing with search and filters (type, age, breed, location)
Pet Detail pages with photo gallery and adoption application button
Adoption Form with full validation and backend storage
Success Stories with before/after photos and testimonials
Get Involved page with volunteer and foster forms
About Us with mission, vision, and partnerships
Contact Us with form and social media links
White, light blue, and green color palette for trust and calm
